title: Win the first hour
caption:
The morning nobody sees is the one that builds you.

Most men lose the day in the first five minutes — before the coffee, before the alarm, before they've made a single real decision. The first hard yes is the frame for everything after it. Discipline shown up for when it costs you is the only kind that forms a man worth counting on.

Win the first hour. Win the day.

#faith #discipline #morningroutine #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #selfcontrol
